evals.prompt: Write a Pine Script v6 indicator that plots a 50-period EMA and colors bars green when price is above it, red when below.
evals.expected_output: A valid //@version=6 indicator script with input.int for length, ta.ema(), plot(), and barcolor()
expectations: Uses input.int or input for length parameter
Uses plot() to display the EMA
Uses barcolor() to color bars conditionally

evals.prompt:
My Pine Script strategy fires entries on every bar instead of just crossovers. Here is the code: //@version=6
strategy('Test')
if close > ta.sma(close, 20)
    strategy.entry('Long', strategy.long)
evals.expected_output: Identified that the strategy requires a crossover condition, not a persistent close > sma condition. Provides corrected code using ta.crossover().
expectations: Identifies the issue as missing crossover condition

evals.prompt: Show me how to get the confirmed daily close on an intraday chart using request.security without repainting.
evals.expected_output: Code using request.security with close[1] and barmerge.lookahead_on to get confirmed previous-close values only
expectations: Uses close[1] offset (not bare close) to avoid repainting
Explains the repainting risk and why the pattern avoids it
